heading: Today
text: Cloudy, with morning rain becoming off and on showers, becoming spotty this afternoon west and south of I-89.  Much cooler.  Highs in the upper 40s to mid 50s.  Winds from the east to southeast near 10 mph, shifting to the northwest late.

heading: Tonight
text: Scattered evening showers north and east of I-89, tapering off.  Partial clearing away from the northern mountains.  Lows in the 30s, near 32 over the higher terrain.  Winds northwest near 10 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Sunshine mixed with clouds.  More afternoon clouds.  Just an isolated sprinkle or shower, mainly through the north and mountains. Continued cool.  Highs in the upper 40s to low 50s.  Winds northwest near 10 mph, a few gusts to 20 mph.
